channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Producer inflation rises to 2.3% in March, driven by food and fuel costs
item.description: South Africa's annual producer inflation increased to 2.3% in March 2026, up from 1.8% in February, primarily driven by a rise in food prices, beverages, tobacco products, and the furniture sector. Th...

item.title: Affordable Amazon Products Under $10 That Are Gaining Popularity in 2026
item.description: Amazon continues to offer incredible deals on budget-friendly products that are becoming fan favorites in 2026. From hydrating lip balms to relaxing Epsom salt soaks, many of these items are under $10...

item.title: Possible prosecutors for VP Sara Duterte's impeachment trial revealed
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte is set to move forward, with Bicol Saro Party-list Representative Terry Ridon naming some of the possible members of the prosecution team. This fol...

item.title: Raiders Continue Strong Run with Standout Performances from Sanders and Sasagi
item.description: The Canberra Raiders maintained their winning streak over the Gold Coast Titans with a 28-12 victory on Saturday, despite a mounting injury list. Young halfback Ethan Sanders delivered an outstanding ...

item.title: TMC Raises Concerns Over EVM Handling in Kolkata, Election Commission Denies Irregularities
item.description: The Trinamool Congress (TMC) has raised allegations of electoral malpractice in the ongoing West Bengal Assembly elections, claiming that the Election Commission was in collusion with the Bharatiya Ja...

item.title: Dangote Refinery Starts Supplying Jet Fuel to Ethiopian Airlines Amid Global Shortages
item.description: Dangote Refinery has started supplying jet fuel directly to Ethiopian Airlines, marking a major milestone in its expansion plans. The refinery, which has been running at full capacity following recent...

item.title: Nairobi United Maintain Unbeaten Run in April to Climb FKF Premier League Table
item.description: Nairobi United FC are making waves in their debut season in the FKF Premier League. The team, newly promoted, showed serious character throughout April by going unbeaten in six matches. This strong pe...

item.title: Blue Jays Defeat Twins 7-3 with Strong Performances from Okamoto, Sosa, and Pinango
item.description: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 7-3 win over the Minnesota Twins on May 2, 2026, with standout performances from Masashi Okamoto, who hit two home runs, and both Edmundo Sosa and Yasser Pinango, who e...

item.title: US Sanctions Joseph Kabila for Supporting Rebels and Fueling Instability in Eastern DRC
item.description: On Thursday, the United States government imposed sanctions on former Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) President Joseph Kabila. The US Treasury stated that Kabila supported Rwanda-backed M23 rebels ...

item.title: Kenyan Government Approves Salary Increases for Workers and Agricultural Sector
item.description: Kenyan President William Ruto has officially announced a 12 per cent salary increase for workers across the country, with a higher 15 per cent raise for employees working in the agricultural sector. T...

item.title: TS Galaxy Chairman Confident Parker Can Lead Team to Nedbank Cup Glory
item.description: TS Galaxy chairman Tim Sukazi has expressed full confidence in interim coach Bernard Parker ahead of the Nedbank Cup final against Durban City at Peter Mokaba Stadium on Saturday. Parker, who took ove...

item.title: Palace Confirms Approval of Vice President Sara Duterte's Travel from May 2 to 15
item.description: The Office of the President (OP) has officially approved the rescheduled travel plans of Vice President Sara Duterte, as confirmed by Palace Press Officer Undersecretary Atty. Claire Castro on May 2, ...

item.title: Motorcycle Rider Killed in Collision with Truck in Meycauayan, Bulacan
item.description: A tragic accident occurred on Thursday night in Meycauayan, Bulacan, when a motorcycle rider, identified only as Edward, lost his life after colliding with a trailer truck along McArthur Highway in Ba...

item.title: Internal debates over antisemitism and Israel-Palestine strain Green Party unity
item.description: The Green Party in England and Wales is facing internal tensions as it grapples with allegations of antisemitism, amplified by rapid membership growth and upcoming local elections. The leadership of Z...

item.title: Amani Nature Forest Reserve in Tanga Attracts International Visitors Due to Rich Biodiversity and Ecotourism
item.description: The Amani Nature Forest Reserve located in Tanga Region is now receiving more attention from people around the world. This place is becoming important for ecotourism because of its rich natural resour...

item.title: Repolling in West Bengal's South 24 Parganas sees clashes between BJP and TMC supporters amid tight security
item.description: On Saturday, 2nd May 2026, clashes erupted between supporters of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) and the Trinamool Congress (TMC) in South 24 Parganas district of West Bengal during the repolling ord...

item.title: Shiksha Arora Prefers Privacy in Her Relationship
item.description: Popular Kenyan TV presenter and dancer Shiksha Arora recently shared why she prefers to keep her love life private. During a live stream with Vindee, Shiksha confirmed that she is dating but avoided r...

item.title: The War Powers Resolution: Why the 60-Day Deadline Doesn't Hold Presidents Accountable
item.description: The War Powers Resolution, passed in 1973, was intended to limit presidential authority by requiring the president to seek Congressional approval for military operations beyond 60 days. The deadline i...

item.title: Addressing the Socio-Economic Risks and Opportunities of AI in South Africa
item.description: South Africa faces a critical moment as artificial intelligence (AI) rapidly reshapes global economies. While local attention remains on immediate crises such as load-shedding, service delivery issues...

item.title: Bruce Blakeman challenges New York's public campaign finance ruling in Albany court
item.description: Bruce Blakeman, the Republican candidate for New York governor, is fighting to regain access to the state’s public campaign finance program after being removed from it in March. The dispute centers on...
